mundo.titulo: New bodycam footage shows Henry Nowak killer's arrest and repeated lies to police
mundo.resumen: Henry Nowak's killer is seen lying to police in bodycam video released after a request from the BBC.

mundo.titulo: Court rules 13 men who allegedly helped rapist drug and abuse wife can be named
mundo.resumen: 13 men are accused of helping a man abuse his wife over a period of years.

mundo.titulo: Watch: Moment woman pulled from rubble alive
mundo.resumen: First responders and volunteers pulled a survivor from under the rubble of a collapsed building in La Guaira.

mundo.titulo: King becomes first monarch to reveal tax bill as royal public funding to double to £100m
mundo.resumen: New figures show the monarch paid £12.9m in tax last year, but do not give any detailed breakdown of how that tax was calculated.

mundo.titulo: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
mundo.resumen: King Charles and Queen Camilla will continue to reside in Clarence House, Buckingham Palace says.

mundo.titulo: Watch: Driver gives lift to armed officer chasing suspect
mundo.resumen: The chase was caught on camera as the motorist pulled over to help in Margate.

negocios.titulo: Power banks and vapes now biggest fire risk on planes
negocios.resumen: Lithium battery fires are the number one safety risk to aircraft, yet the number of devices found in hold bags has nearly doubled in a year.

negocios.titulo: I'm back at home again after uni - here's how I'm making it work
negocios.resumen: Rising costs are forcing more young adults to live with their parents, here's how not to come to blows.

negocios.titulo: Asia stock markets slide as tech shares slump
negocios.resumen: Trading on South Korea's Kospi index was halted for the third time this week to prevent panic selling.

negocios.titulo: Who could be the UK's next chancellor?
negocios.resumen: The prime minister's resignation has fired the starting gun on the race to be in charge of the UK's finances.

negocios.titulo: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
negocios.resumen: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.

negocios.titulo: The abundant but expensive energy source that's under your feet
negocios.resumen: Start-ups are taking fresh approaches to geothermal energy, but will the economics work?

tecnologia.titulo: Robotaxis drives miles just to get cleaned and charged; this new startup wants to fix that
tecnologia.resumen: Aseon Labs, which came out of Y Combinator's 2026 spring cohort, has raised $10 million from Crane Venture Partners and others.

tecnologia.titulo: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
tecnologia.resumen: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

tecnologia.titulo: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
tecnologia.resumen: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

tecnologia.titulo: YouTube Shorts are getting even shorter with an update that lets you double the playback speed
tecnologia.resumen: YouTube Shorts is getting a makeover.

tecnologia.titulo: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
tecnologia.resumen: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

tecnologia.titulo: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
tecnologia.resumen: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third-party breach.

tecnologia.titulo: Prime Day is offering rare discounts on Philips Hue smart lights
tecnologia.resumen: Philips Hue products don’t often see major discounts, which makes this year’s Prime Day deals especially notable. Prices have dropped significantly across much of the company’s smart lighting lineup, with deals on everything from smart bulb starter kits and sleep lamps to smart buttons. In some cases, the lowest prices are available directly from Philips […]

tecnologia.titulo: With GTA looming, consoles are getting expensive at the worst possible time
tecnologia.resumen: The release of Grand Theft Auto VI is a singular moment, the kind of massive cultural phenomenon that makes people want to go out and buy a console to play it. It is the preeminent modern example of what's known as a "system seller." There's almost certainly a large audience of people who were waiting […]

tecnologia.titulo: Samsung will soon start charging to access its smart home API
tecnologia.resumen: From October this year Samsung will roll out a variety of new paid tiers for access to its SmartThings API, including a $4.99 monthly plan for "non-commercial, individual developers." It won't just be developers that pay the price though. Some more advanced smart home users are likely to fall afoul of the rule change if […]

tecnologia.titulo: Apple’s most powerful Macs might be waiting until 2027 for big processor upgrades
tecnologia.resumen: Apple is expected to shake up its usual Mac silicon release strategy, with Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reporting that there won't be Pro or Max versions of the upcoming M6 chip. Instead, Apple wants to "fast-track technologies that it originally planned to release later" with the M7 launch next year. The Cupertino company will reportedly only […]

tecnologia.titulo: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 130 great deals to choose from
tecnologia.resumen: We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers, headphones, and more.
